text: Dashboard load time has increased from 3 seconds to 18 seconds after the March release. The customer says executives use this dashboard daily.
Slack notifications fail intermittently when more than 20 alerts are triggered in one hour.
Customer requested SAML SSO audit logs. Their compliance team needs exportable sign-in history for quarterly review.
Users are confused by the new workflow builder. They want templates and a guided setup checklist.
Webhook delivery failures increased after API v2 migration. Customer reports missing warehouse status updates.
